BaseField.Name: description
BaseField.Text:
The Office of Problem Gambling (OPG) is dedicated to promoting awareness and prevention of gambling disorder and making treatment available to those negatively impacted by problem gambling behavior.
The California Department of Public Health (CDPH) works to protect the public's health in the Golden State and helps shape positive health outcomes for individuals, families and communities. The Department's programs and services, implemented in collaboration with local health departments and state, federal and private partners, touch the lives of every Californian and visitor to the state 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
This form will require about 30 to 40 minutes. You will be able to save a draft and resume it later.

BaseField.Name: Label39
BaseField.Text: Do you speak a language other than English at home?

BaseField.Name: Label37
BaseField.Text: How well do you speak English?

BaseField.Name: englishLevelSelect
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: How well do you speak English?

BaseField.Name: DataField40
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Do you speak a language other than English at home?

BaseField.Text: Date of CalGET End of Treatment Form

BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Date of CalGET End of Treatment Form

BaseField.Name: What type(s) of gambling have you done in the last 12 months? Mark all that apply.
BaseField.Text: What type(s) of gambling have you done in the last 12 months? Mark all that apply.

BaseField.Name: In which language did you provide today’s treatment services?
BaseField.Text: In which language did you provide today’s treatment services?

BaseField.Name: In which language did you provide today’s treatment services?Drpdown
Label112
BaseField.Text: Based on your clinical experience, how severe is this client’s gambling behavior?

BaseField.Name: Label115
BaseField.Text: Based on your clinical experience, how adversely affected is this client?

BaseField.Name: Label116
BaseField.Text: Based on your clinical experience and the client’s presemtation, how likely it it that this client will complete all of the state-funded treatment sessions?

BaseField.Name: Label122
BaseField.Text: Compare the client’s condition at Intake to this visit, how much has the client changed?

BaseField.Name: Label127
BaseField.Text: Based on your clinical experience and the client's presentation, how would you rate this client's prognosis for recovery from problem gambing?

BaseField.Name: Label133
BaseField.Text: Is your client taking any psychiatric medications?

BaseField.Name: DataField132
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Is your client taking any psychiatric medications?

BaseField.Name: Label134
BaseField.Text: If yes, please answer the following three questions:

BaseField.Name: Label137
BaseField.Text: What classes of medication is your client taking? Mark all that apply.
